The '''N2I-4 power converter''' was part of the power system of the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] when it belonged to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. The unit was manufactured by [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 13: Prisoner of the Nikto Pirates]]'' {{C|Spelled N21-4 power converter}}
